data.title: capture-review-diff.sh: script not exposed via .claude/scripts/dso shim -> COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md Step 2 fails with 'command not found'
data.description:
## Incident Overview
When executing COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md Step 2 (capture diff hash), the command '.claude/scripts/dso capture-review-diff.sh' fails with 'dso: command not found: capture-review-diff.sh'.

## Actual Behavior
The .claude/scripts/dso shim does not dispatch capture-review-diff.sh. The script exists at plugins/dso/scripts/capture-review-diff.sh but is not registered in the shim dispatch table.

## Expected Behavior
'.claude/scripts/dso capture-review-diff.sh' should dispatch to the plugin script.

## Impact
Forces manual workaround: manually run 'git diff --staged > $DIFF_FILE' using the hash from compute-diff-hash.sh (not sha256sum). If the wrong hash is used (sha256sum instead of compute-diff-hash.sh output), the review agent will fail diff verification with hash mismatch.

## Reproduction
.claude/scripts/dso capture-review-diff.sh  # exits with 'command not found'

## Context
Observed during worktree-20260412-173956. compute-diff-hash.sh produces a different hash than 'git diff --staged | sha256sum | cut -c1-8' — both must use compute-diff-hash.sh output for the filename.
